mapper.sql: pea.employee_id pe_id, pea.type, pea.award_name, pea.award_star_time, pea.award_end_time, pea.award_company, pea.award_content, pea.award_result, pea.award_money, pea.reference_backup_flag, pea.remarks, pea.attribute1, pea.attribute2, pea.attribute3, pea.enabled_flag, pea.id, pea.create_time, pea.create_by, pea.update_time, pea.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.award_name as ${tAlias}_award_name, ${tAlias}.award_star_time as ${tAlias}_award_star_time, ${tAlias}.award_end_time as ${tAlias}_award_end_time, ${tAlias}.award_company as ${tAlias}_award_company, ${tAlias}.award_content as ${tAlias}_award_content, ${tAlias}.award_result as ${tAlias}_award_result, ${tAlias}.award_money as ${tAlias}_award_money, ${tAlias}.reference_backup_flag as ${tAlias}_reference_backup_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
from pm_employee_award pea join pm_employee pe on pea.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_award (employee_id, type, award_name, award_star_time, award_end_time, award_company, award_content, award_result, award_money, reference_backup_flag, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardStarTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{awardEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{awardCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{referenceBackupFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_award set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_name = #{awardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_star_time = #{awardStarTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, award_end_time = #{awardEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, award_company = #{awardCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_content = #{awardContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_result = #{awardResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_money = #{awardMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reference_backup_flag = #{referenceBackupFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pea.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pea.award_company) > 0 then pea.award_company else null end as award_company, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pea.award_content) > 0 then pea.award_content else null end as award_content, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pea.award_name) > 0 then pea.award_name else null end as award_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pea.award_result) > 0 then pea.award_result else null end as award_result, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pea.remarks) > 0 then pea.remarks else null end as remarks, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pea.type) > 0 then pea.type else null end as type from pm_employee_award pea join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pea.employee_id where pea.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pea.award_company,pea.award_content,pea.award_name,pea.award_result,pea.remarks,pea.type ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_award (employee_id, type, award_name, award_star_time, award_end_time, award_company, award_content, award_result, award_money, reference_backup_flag, remarks,enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) select peai.employee_id, peai.type, peai.award_name, peai.award_star_time, peai.award_end_time, peai.award_company, peai.award_content, peai.award_result, peai.award_money, peai.reference_backup_flag, peai.remarks,1, peai.create_time, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, peai.update_time, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} from pm_employee_award_interface peai where peai.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and peai.employee_id != -1 and peai.data_status = 'T'
